name: hostess
description: Deploy and operate full-stack applications on Hostess from Codex. Write hostess.yml configs, run deploys, manage secrets, stream logs, connect to databases, and set up CI/CD — without leaving your editor.

interface.shortDescription: Deploy and operate multi-service apps on Hostess.
interface.longDescription: Use Hostess from Codex to write hostess.yml configs, run deploys, manage secrets, check service status, stream logs, connect to databases, and set up CI/CD — all without leaving your editor.
defaultPrompt: Create a hostess.yml for my app.
Check the status of my Hostess services.
